learningCards.subject: Science
learningCards.parentSummary: This week in Grade 7 Science, we reviewed two-digit subtraction. Students practiced to strengthen their understanding of subtraction, which helps them solve science problems. Please encourage your child to keep practicing subtraction at home to reinforce their learning.

translatedSummaries.zh: 本周我们在七年级科学课上复习了两位数减法。学生们通过练习加强了对减法的理解，这对他们解决科学问题很有帮助。请鼓励孩子在家继续练习减法，帮助他们巩固所学知识。
translatedSummaries.en: This week in Grade 7 Science, we reviewed two-digit subtraction. Students practiced to strengthen their understanding of subtraction, which helps them solve science problems. Please encourage your child to keep practicing subtraction at home to reinforce their learning.
translatedSummaries.fr: Cette semaine, en sciences de 7e année, nous avons révisé la soustraction à deux chiffres. Les élèves ont pratiqué pour renforcer leur compréhension de la soustraction, ce qui les aide à résoudre des problèmes scientifiques. Veuillez encourager votre enfant à continuer à pratiquer la soustraction à la maison pour consolider ses apprentissages.

learningCards.subject: Math
learningCards.parentSummary: [Demo] Parent summary for “DDD” (Math · G7). Edit before sending.

translatedSummaries.en: [Demo] Parent summary for “DDD” (Math · G7). Edit before sending.
translatedSummaries.zh: [演示] 家长版摘要：「DDD」（Math · G7）。发送前请修改。
translatedSummaries.fr: [Démo] Résumé parents : « DDD » (Math · G7). À relire avant envoi.

childKnowledge.content:
下面是根据「DDD」（Math · G7）为你挑的几支适合孩子看的小短片，节奏友好、画面清晰。可以和家长一起看，边看边想：这个主题和你课上学的有什么联系？

1. 入门：先建立整体印象
视频：Introduction for kids — DDD
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=87SftBC1vFo
推荐：用简单语言搭一个“地图”，帮孩子知道今天要解决什么问题，适合第一次接触。

2. 深入一点：把关键概念讲清楚
视频：Key ideas explained — DDD
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5vZlQe7yM8Y
推荐：把抽象词和具体例子对上号，适合巩固理解、记几个关键词。

3. 动手或延伸：试一试、说一说
视频：Try it / mini activity — DDD
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFJ5QdG1J1k
推荐：短任务或小游戏式演示，看完可以试一个小练习或讲给家长听。

learningCards.subject: Math
learningCards.topic: Plus and Minus in two-digital number
learningCards.parentSummary: In class we reviewed factoring patterns: pull out a GCF first, then try grouping or simple cases. At home, two textbook examples with clear intermediate steps are enough—no need to finish the whole set in one sitting.

translatedSummaries.zh: 课堂上我们复习了因式分解：先提公因式，再尝试分组或简单情形。回家只需两道课本例题，并把中间步骤写清楚即可——不必一次做完整组作业。
translatedSummaries.en: In class we reviewed factoring patterns: pull out a GCF first, then try grouping or simple cases. At home, two textbook examples with clear intermediate steps are enough—no need to finish the whole set in one sitting.
translatedSummaries.fr: En classe nous avons revu la factorisation : d’abord extraire le PGCD, puis essayer le regroupement ou les cas simples. À la maison, deux exemples du manuel avec les étapes intermédiaires suffisent — pas besoin de finir toute la série en une fois.

tonightActions.text: Tonight: pick two homework items labeled “factoring” and rewrite each solution with one extra line of work shown.
Together, say aloud the first step you try before using a formula (GCF vs. pattern).
If it’s still stuck after 10 minutes, message the teacher with the problem number.

learningCards.subject: Art
learningCards.teacherNotes: Today the children learned what Van Gogh's style is. They looked at The Starry Night and Sunflowers
learningCards.parentSummary:
What does it mean?
It means that today, the kids learned how a famous painter named Vincent van Gogh made his art. They didn't just look at his pictures; they learned the "tricks" he used to make his art look special.

What is Van Gogh's "style"?
To explain it simply to a child or in plain talk, his style has three main parts:

- Thick Paint and Lines: He didn't make his paintings smooth. He used thick paint. You can see the marks from his brush. It looks like many little "dashes" or "sticks" of color.

- Bright Colors: He loved using very bright colors, like bold yellows and deep blues, even if the real object didn't look exactly like that.

- Swirls and Movement: Everything in his paintings looks like it is moving. The stars look like they are spinning (swirls), and the grass looks like it is blowing in the wind.

In short:
The children learned to paint with bright colors and swirly, thick lines to make their pictures look full of energy and feeling.

translatedSummaries.zh:
这代表什么？
今天孩子们学习了著名画家文森特·梵高的创作方式：不只是看画，还了解他让作品显得特别的“手法”。

什么是梵高的“风格”？用孩子能懂的话说，主要有三点：

- 厚涂与笔触：画面不追求光滑，颜料涂得厚，能看见笔刷的痕迹，像许多小色条。

- 鲜艳色彩：喜欢用很亮的黄、很深的蓝等，即使和实物不完全一样。

- 旋涡与动感：画里的一切都像在动：星星像在旋转，草叶像在风中摇摆。

总之：孩子们学着用鲜艳、厚重、卷曲的线条，让画面充满力量与情感。
translatedSummaries.en:
What does it mean?
It means that today, the kids learned how a famous painter named Vincent van Gogh made his art. They didn't just look at his pictures; they learned the "tricks" he used to make his art look special.

What is Van Gogh's "style"?
To explain it simply to a child or in plain talk, his style has three main parts:

- Thick Paint and Lines: He didn't make his paintings smooth. He used thick paint. You can see the marks from his brush. It looks like many little "dashes" or "sticks" of color.

- Bright Colors: He loved using very bright colors, like bold yellows and deep blues, even if the real object didn't look exactly like that.

- Swirls and Movement: Everything in his paintings looks like it is moving. The stars look like they are spinning (swirls), and the grass looks like it is blowing in the wind.

In short:
The children learned to paint with bright colors and swirly, thick lines to make their pictures look full of energy and feeling.
translatedSummaries.fr:
Qu’est-ce que cela veut dire ?
Aujourd’hui, les enfants ont découvert comment le peintre Vincent van Gogh créait : pas seulement regarder des tableaux, mais les « astuces » qui rendent son art particulier.

Qu’est-ce que son « style » ? En termes simples, trois grands traits :

- Peinture épaisse et coups de pinceau visibles, comme de petits traits de couleur.

- Couleurs vives (jaunes audacieux, bleus profonds), même si ce n’est pas le réel au détail près.

- Tourbillons et mouvement : les étoiles semblent tourner, l’herbe ondule au vent.

En bref : peindre avec des couleurs vives et des lignes épaisses et ondulées pour donner de l’énergie et de l’émotion.

childKnowledge.heroImageAlt: 美术馆中的画作（演示配图）
childKnowledge.content:
给你挑了几支讲梵高、笔触和《星夜》的小短片，画风很活泼。你可以边画边看，想一想：他的画为什么看起来像在动？

1. 入门：梵高是谁？他为什么这么有名
视频：Vincent van Gogh for Kids | Famous Artists for Children
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=87SftBC1vFo
推荐：用孩子能懂的话介绍生平与代表作，适合第一次接触梵高时建立整体印象。

2. 细看《星夜》：旋涡、厚涂和颜色
视频：Starry Night by Vincent van Gogh | Art for Kids!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5vZlQe7yM8Y
推荐：画面贴近你课上看到的「旋涡与动感」，帮助孩子把「风格」三个字和具体笔触对上号。

3. 动手向：向日葵与厚涂笔触
视频：Van Gogh Sunflowers Art Lesson for Kids
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFJ5QdG1J1k
推荐：跟着示范用厚涂和亮色叠色，和「向日葵」主题直接呼应；看完可以试画一小张并拍照给老师。

learningCards.subject: Math
learningCards.parentSummary: This week in Grade 7 Math, students will have light homework focusing on reviewing basic addition concepts like 1 + 1. It's a chance for them to strengthen their understanding with simple practice.

translatedSummaries.zh: 本周七年级数学家庭作业较轻，重点是复习基础加法（如 1+1）。这是巩固理解、做简单练习的好机会。
translatedSummaries.en: This week in Grade 7 Math, students will have light homework focusing on reviewing basic addition concepts like 1 + 1. It's a chance for them to strengthen their understanding with simple practice.
translatedSummaries.fr: Cette semaine en maths (6e/5e), les devoirs sont légers et portent sur la révision de l’addition de base (comme 1 + 1). C’est l’occasion de renforcer la compréhension avec de la pratique simple.

learningCards.subject: Math
learningCards.parentSummary: This week in Grade 7 math, we reviewed factoring. Students learned how to break down multiplication expressions into simpler parts, which helps them understand math operations better. Please encourage your child to review multiplication tables at home and try some factoring practice problems.

translatedSummaries.zh: 本周我们在七年级数学课上复习了因式分解的内容。学生们学习了如何将乘法表达式拆解成更简单的部分，这有助于他们更好地理解数学运算。请鼓励孩子在家复习乘法表，并尝试做一些因式分解的练习题。
translatedSummaries.en: This week in Grade 7 math, we reviewed factoring. Students learned how to break down multiplication expressions into simpler parts, which helps them understand math operations better. Please encourage your child to review multiplication tables at home and try some factoring practice problems.
translatedSummaries.fr: Cette semaine, en mathématiques de 7e année, nous avons révisé la factorisation. Les élèves ont appris à décomposer des expressions de multiplication en parties plus simples, ce qui les aide à mieux comprendre les opérations mathématiques. Veuillez encourager votre enfant à revoir les tables de multiplication à la maison et à essayer quelques exercices de factorisation.

childKnowledge.content:
下面是根据「乘法」（Math · G7）为你挑的几支适合孩子看的小短片，节奏友好、画面清晰。可以和家长一起看，边看边想：这个主题和你课上学的有什么联系？

视频：Introduction for kids — 乘法
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=87SftBC1vFo
推荐：用简单语言搭一个“地图”，帮孩子知道今天要解决什么问题，适合第一次接触。

2. 深入一点：把关键概念讲清楚
视频：Key ideas explained — 乘法
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5vZlQe7yM8Y
推荐：把抽象词和具体例子对上号，适合巩固理解、记几个关键词。

learningCards.subject: Science
learningCards.parentSummary: Air pushes on everything around us; how we feel it and a simple “column of air” picture.

translatedSummaries.zh: 空气会挤压我们周围的一切；我们如何感受到它，以及一个简单的“空气柱”画面。
translatedSummaries.en: Air pushes on everything around us; how we feel it and a simple “column of air” picture.
translatedSummaries.fr: L’air exerce une pression sur tout ce qui nous entoure ; comment on le ressent et une image simple de « colonne d’air ».

tonightActions.text: Tonight: revisit “What is atmospheric pressure?” with one class or homework example.
Ask your child to explain the main idea in their own words.
If it’s stuck after ~15 minutes, note the question and message the teacher.

learningCards.subject: Biology
learningCards.parentSummary: Cell wall, chloroplasts, nucleus—what to remember for the diagram label sheet.

translatedSummaries.zh: 细胞壁、叶绿体、细胞核——示意图标注单上要记住的重点。
translatedSummaries.en: Cell wall, chloroplasts, nucleus—what to remember for the diagram label sheet.
translatedSummaries.fr: Paroi cellulaire, chloroplastes, noyau — ce qu’il faut retenir pour la feuille d’étiquetage du schéma.

childKnowledge.heroImageAlt: 医学与健康主题插图（演示）
childKnowledge.content:
下面这些视频画风可爱、互动也多，给你这个年级看刚刚好。随便点开一个，看看哪个最有意思：

1. 全方位器官概览：适合作为 Unit Intro
视频：Human Body Organs | Science For Kids | STEM Home Learning
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B3Fv2X8EKfE
推荐：动画色彩鲜艳，介绍了心脏、肺、大脑等核心器官。视频中提到「成人有 206 块骨头而婴儿有 300 块」这类有趣的 facts，很容易吸引 G6 孩子的注意力。

2. 沉浸式体验：人体内部之旅
视频：A Journey Inside Your Body (Bright Side)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3pjkQcQBTtc
推荐：这是一个模拟「缩小版旅行」的视角，第一人称视角带学生进入消化道和血管。虽然风格稍显活泼，但它能很好地建立空间感，让学生理解器官之间的物理关系。

3. 专项系统：消化系统（G6 重点）
视频：Biology | "What's In Our Digestive System?" Explained
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W55-QiHCYGA
推荐：Big Bang Academy 的风格非常符合「可爱」的要求，动画极其精良，逻辑清晰，适合讲解复杂的消化过程，帮助学生理解「能量转化」这一科学概念。

tonightActions.text: Tonight: revisit “Plant vs animal cells” with one class or homework example.
Ask your child to explain the main idea in their own words.
If it’s stuck after ~15 minutes, note the question and message the teacher.

learningCards.subject: Science
learningCards.parentSummary: This week in science, your child is reviewing the concept of barometric pressure, which is about understanding how air pressure works in the atmosphere. This helps them learn about weather and how it changes.

translatedSummaries.zh: 本周科学课复习气压概念，帮助孩子理解大气中的压力如何运作，从而更好地认识天气与天气变化。
translatedSummaries.en: This week in science, your child is reviewing the concept of barometric pressure, which is about understanding how air pressure works in the atmosphere. This helps them learn about weather and how it changes.
translatedSummaries.fr: Cette semaine en sciences, votre enfant révise la pression barométrique : comprendre comment la pression de l’air fonctionne dans l’atmosphère, pour mieux saisir la météo et ses changements.

childKnowledge.heroImageAlt: 知识面板示意（演示配图）
childKnowledge.content:
下面几支小视频用动画讲气压、天气和大气，很好懂。你可以边看边想：空气是怎么压住地面的？风和云又是怎么来的？

1. 从「飞机为什么能飞」理解气压与升力
视频：How Airplanes Fly! | Airplane Science | SciShow Kids
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VLpSxHwfU04
推荐：用机翼、风速与空气密度把「气压差」讲得很直观；适合当「大气压」的引子，把抽象概念和看得见的现象联系起来。

2. 大气层：我们头顶的「空气海洋」
视频：Bill Nye The Science Guy - Atmosphere
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r4yL18XOmZ0
推荐：经典科学秀风格，把大气层、压强与生命所需气体讲得很上头；语速偏快，建议开字幕或和家长一起看。

3. 天气与水的循环（和云、雨怎么来有关）
视频：The Water Cycle | The Dr. Binocs Show | Peekaboo Kidz
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fcTDSPM5S4U
推荐：把蒸发、凝结、降水串成一条线，帮助理解「为什么气压图和天气预报总连在一起」；动画节奏友好，适合做笔记关键词。

Together, say aloud the first step you try before using a formula (GCF vs. pattern).

learningCards.subject: Writing
learningCards.parentSummary: Not literal comparison—how metaphors work in poems and everyday speech.

translatedSummaries.zh: 不是字面比较——隐喻在诗歌和日常表达里如何运作。
translatedSummaries.en: Not literal comparison—how metaphors work in poems and everyday speech.
translatedSummaries.fr: Pas une comparaison littérale — comment fonctionnent les métaphores dans les poèmes et le langage courant.

Ask your child to explain the main idea in their own words.
If it’s stuck after ~15 minutes, note the question and message the teacher.

learningCards.subject: Literature

translatedSummaries.en: Why we still read Shakespeare and how to help with reading at home.
